mapper.sql: recipe_id, author_id, couple_id, title, cover_img, description, category, meal_type, difficulty, cooking_time, story, status, view_count, like_count, cook_count, is_anniversary, anniversary_date, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recipe ( recipe_id, author_id, title, cover_img, description, category, meal_type, difficulty, cooking_time, story, status, is_anniversary, anniversary_date, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{recipeId}, #{authorId}, #{title}, #{coverImg}, #{description}, #{category}, #{mealType}, #{difficulty}, #{cookingTime}, #{story}, #{status}, #{isAnniversary}, #{anniversaryDate}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT FROM recipe WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} AND status != 2
mapper.update:
UPDATE recipe
title = #{title}, cover_img = #{coverImg}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, meal_type = #{mealType}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, cooking_time = #{cookingTime}, story = #{story}, is_anniversary = #{isAnniversary}, anniversary_date = #{anniversaryDate}, updated_at = NOW()
WHERE recipe_id = #{recipeId} AND status != 2
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM recipe WHERE couple_id = #{coupleId} AND is_anniversary = 1 AND anniversary_date = #{date} AND status = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT FROM recipe
ORDER BY created_at DESC, recipe_id DESC
